title: A Visit to the Dentist
content: Ethan felt nervous before his dentist appointment on Tuesday morning. He never liked the sound of dental tools or the smell inside the clinic. The waiting room was quiet, and soft music played in the background. When the dentist called his name, Ethan took a deep breath and followed her into the office. Luckily, the appointment was simple and quick. The dentist only cleaned his teeth and reminded him to floss more often. After leaving the clinic, Ethan felt relieved and rewarded himself with a coffee nearby.
